summary: Russian forces have introduced the "Yolka" automated drone interceptor, a 1.3 kg system capable of 230 km/h speeds and autonomous target engagement via AI. China demonstrated ground combat robotic dogs operating in coordinated "wolf pack" formations with real-time data sharing and target engagement. The UAE unveiled the SHADOW 25, a jet-powered UAV with a 450 km/h cruising speed, 25 kg warhead, and 250 km strike range. Russia has begun deploying the "Lis-2" interceptor drone and completed testing of the "Prince Vladimir Svyatoslavovich" FPV drone, while also integrating the LazerBuzz laser system with radar. Ukrainian forces launched a major drone attack on March 29, with Russian air defenses intercepting at least 203 UAVs, including strikes on the Ust-Luga port. Ukrainian troops in the Kostiantynivka sector used drone detectors to survive an FPV attack, and Russian Ka-52 crews were eliminated by FPV drones after a crash landing near Nadiivka. The "Rubikon" Center reported 95 enemy targets destroyed on March 30, including personnel and fixed-wing UAVs.
